meaning: adj.准不会有错的,一定能达到目的的
examples: These products are promoted as surefire cures for various diseases.
There is no easy or surefire way to fill vacancies.
One surefire tip: a slight change of topic goes a long way.
Turns out, sophisticated adult fare is not necessarily a surefire hit with the fast food crowd.
But the most surefire way to build up scores is with risky, highly acrobatic skills.
